overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-slicked neon-lit urban plaza at night, ascending red stairs, and reaching an elevated overlook. The environment features futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and scattered pedestrians with umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban plaza with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza toward the pink neon canopy structure ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding black umbrella walking across the plaza

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building wrapped with rotating holographic advertisements
large overhead structure illuminated with bright pink neon lights
rain-slicked reflective pavement mirroring the neon lights
large floating digital advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide urban plaza at night, surrounded by towering glass buildings and vibrant neon signage. The wet pavement reflects the pink and blue lights while pedestrians with umbrellas move through the space. The cylindrical ad tower dominates the center view ahead.

events.description: character enters the red staircase leaving the open plaza behind
character passes a person in wheelchair at the stair landing and continues ascending

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide red stairs between buildings, following other pedestrians upward toward the upper level

notable_agents.action: shirtless pedestrian climbing stairs ahead of ego
person in wheelchair at the stair landing

entered.detail: wide red-painted concrete staircase with metal railings between buildings
tall vertical pink neon light strip running up the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open plaza into a narrow stairwell, ascending red concrete steps between towering buildings. Vertical neon strips illuminate the walls while other pedestrians climb ahead. The space is enclosed and sheltered from the open sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook platform with glass railing

events.description: character emerges onto the upper platform with red ambient lighting
character stops at the glass railing to overlook the street and city below

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper platform and stopping at the overlook to view the city below from the elevated vantage point

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in zebra-pattern jacket walking alongside ego

entered.detail: transparent glass safety railing at the platform edge overlooking the city
panoramic view of the neon-lit city streets and buildings below the platform

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an elevated platform bathed in red neon light, walking past the cylindrical ad tower now seen from above. The character stops at a glass railing to overlook the sprawling neon cityscape below, with streets and buildings visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-slicked urban plaza up to an elevated overlook of a neon-lit cityscape. It begins by tracking the character through an open square where pink and blue lights reflect off wet pavement and a massive cylindrical ad tower looms ahead. As the character moves forward, the open space narrows into a sheltered stairwell, shifting the perspective to an ascent up red concrete steps flanked by vertical neon strips. The scene then opens up as the character emerges onto a high platform, passing the ad tower from a new vantage point. Finally, the camera settles at a glass railing, revealing a sprawling view of the futuristic city and its distant glowing architecture.
